features: UNIQUE ODOUR FIGHTING TECHNOLOGY: Febreze bathroom air freshener with unique odour fighter technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent in your bathroom and home.
NON-FLAMMABLE SPRAY: Febreze Spray Air Fresheners are non-flammable, perfect for any room in the house.
FRESH SCENT: This room air freshener leaves your home with a beautiful light, fresh scent.

This Febreze Spray Air Freshener doubles as a room freshener and toilet freshener, making it a versatile addition to your home cleaning supplies. Use it as a room spray fragrance or a bathroom spray for a fresh, clean scent.
description: Febreze Air Freshener Air Mist for Room and Bathroom 185m x 3. Choose the scent you want. Febreze Air Freshener with Odourclear technology fights tough lingering odours, leaving a light fresh scent. With 2x the normal odour fighting ingredients, our toughest air freshener with OdourClear technology doesn’t just mask odours, it truly fights them leaving a beautiful fresh scent. Whether you have persistent pet pongs, tough tobacco smells, or other household whiffs that just won’t leave, there’s a Febreze Heavy Duty air freshener for you. Febreze Aerosols are non-flammable and contain 100% natural propellant. This makes them a perfect fit for any room in the house. Try the full range of Febreze products with the unique Odourclear technology, such as Febreze Fabric Refresher and Car Freshener. Also try 3volution Plugs, to continuously fight odours and freshen for up to 90 days
